steps: Add 200 mL 5x M9 salts to a clean media bottle M9 Salts by Steven W Wilhelm
Add 2 mL 1 M MgSO 4 Magnesium sulfate heptahydrate Contributed by users
Add 1 mL 0.1 M CaCl 2 Calcium Chloride Contributed by users
Add sterile dH 2 O to bring solution to 1 L final volume
creator: Steven W Wilhelm
